name: Gary "Roach" Sanderson
description:
"You're so fucking annoying."

Don't you understand?

He isn't your friend.

Sorry it took me so long to make this one, was a bit busy yesterday with work and then got dragged (wanted to go) bowling.

Also, if anyone with knowledge of how BSL works structurally, like compared to how English is worded when spoken, could please give me a link to something that might help me (an American) understand how it would swap over, that would be literally amazing.

⚠️TRIGGER/CONTENT WARNINGS⚠️

Angst, people pushing you away
